items_scale_config_check.name: items_scale_config_check
items_scale_config_check.value:
(
        ("items"."value_type" = 'scale' and "items"."scale_min" is not null and "items"."scale_max" is not null and "items"."scale_min" < "items"."scale_max")
        or
        ("items"."value_type" <> 'scale' and "items"."scale_min" is null and "items"."scale_max" is null)
      )

records_single_value_check.name: records_single_value_check
records_single_value_check.value:
(
        (case when "records"."value_number" is not null then 1 else 0 end) +
        (case when "records"."value_text" is not null then 1 else 0 end) +
        (case when "records"."value_boolean" is not null then 1 else 0 end)
      ) = 1
